getStarted.title: Get started with AI agents
getStarted.description: Hand off tasks to autonomous AI agents that iterate until the job is done. Run them locally, in the background, or in the cloud, with your choice of AI provider. Track all sessions without leaving VS Code.

paths.title: Build with agents
paths.description: Delegate tasks to autonomous AI agents that plan, execute, and iterate on your behalf.
highlights: Generate entire features from a single prompt
Run agents locally, in the background, or in the cloud

paths.title: Code with AI assistance
paths.description: Stay in control while AI accelerates your workflow with smart suggestions and chat.
highlights: Get context-aware code completions as you type
Ask questions and get answers in inline chat
Refactor, fix, and generate tests with a single action

paths.title: Explore the editor
paths.description: Master the core features of VS Code that make you productive in any language.
highlights: Integrated debugging, terminal, and source control
Thousands of extensions for any workflow

latest.title: VS Code 1.120 release
latest.description: Run agents across all your projects with the Agents window.

latest.title: Remote control Copilot CLI
latest.description: Monitor and steer ongoing Copilot CLI sessions from github.com or GitHub Mobile.

latest.title: VS Code coding harness
latest.description: Learn about the coding harness, model evaluations, and the agent processing workflow.
